summary: The implementation covers most requirements comprehensively. Backend models, authentication, CRUD operations, and frontend pages are implemented. However, there are some missing requirements around user data initialization, updateManga functionality, and evidence of specific admin capabilities.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create backend data models in Motoko for User with fields: principal (identity), username, email, role (admin/user), bookmarks (array of manga IDs), readingHistory (array of manga ID + chapter number pairs), and createdAt timestamp
missing_requirements.reason: While User type exists in backend/main.mo with the correct fields, there is no evidence of automatic user creation or initialization when a user first authenticates. The UserProfile system is separate and does not create the full User record with bookmarks/readingHistory arrays.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend methods: getMangaList (public, returns all manga with pagination support), getMangaById (public, returns full manga with all chapters), searchManga (public, filters by title/description), addManga (admin-only), addChapter (admin-only), and updateManga (admin-only)
missing_requirements.reason: The updateManga method is not visible in the truncated backend/main.mo file. While getMangaList, getMangaById, searchManga, addManga, and addChapter are present, updateManga is not shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create an admin panel page (accessible only to admin users) with forms to add new manga (title, description, cover image URL), add chapters to existing manga (select manga, enter chapter number, title, and array of image URLs), and view all manga with edit capabilities
missing_requirements.reason: While AddMangaForm and AddChapterForm exist for creating manga and chapters, there is no evidence of view all manga with edit capabilities or editing functionality in the admin panel. The requirement specifically mentions edit capabilities which are not shown in the diff.
